summary: TWO_COLUMN: polar area for cardioid r(θ)=1+cos θ. LEFT NumberPlane with BLUE cardioid + YELLOW growing sector polygon via always_redraw sweeping 0→2π driven by ValueTracker theta_tr, ORANGE radial arrow at leading edge. RIGHT shows live β, A(β)=½∫_0^β r² dt computed via np.trapezoid converging to 3π/2.
